problem id: 7f73016f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00011000 -> 11110011
  01001111 -> 10011010
  00001011 -> 10111010
  00000001 -> 00111111
  00111001 -> 00100011
  11000111 -> 11011110
  11001001 -> 01011111
  01110000 -> 11000111
  00001001 -> 00111011

query: 01010010
predicted answer: 01010110
